# Commands: Opentrons Flex

Generated by `/v1b1-protocol Opentrons Flex server tests/smoke/inputs/opentrons-flex-openapi-snippet.yaml` on 2026-04-25. 4 entries, keyed to v1b1 transport form `command-class`. Source: `tests/smoke/inputs/opentrons-flex-openapi-snippet.yaml`. Drops into a `v1b1-author`-emitted scaffold's command-class slot at `OpentronsFlexPIPBackend.<method>` bodies — build a Command instance and call `self.driver.send_command(command)`.

## Aspirate

**Verb / Opcode**: POST /runs/{run_id}/commands

**Transport form**: command-class

**Confidence**: confirmed

**Request shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| commandType | string | always `"aspirate"` |
| params.pipetteId | string (UUID) | id of mounted pipette returned from `GET /instruments` |
| params.labwareId | string (UUID) | id of source labware (assigned at run setup) |
| params.wellName | string | well coordinate, e.g. `A1` |
| params.wellLocation.origin | enum `top \| bottom \| meniscus` | reference point for offset |
| params.wellLocation.offset.x | float | mm |
| params.wellLocation.offset.y | float | mm |
| params.wellLocation.offset.z | float | mm |
| params.flowRate | float | μL/sec |
| params.volume | float | μL |

**Response shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| data.id | string (UUID) | command id for status polling |
| data.status | enum `queued \| running \| succeeded \| failed` | terminal states are `succeeded` / `failed` |
| data.completedAt | string (ISO-8601) or null | populated when status terminal |
| data.error | object or null | `error.errorType` + `error.detail` when status = failed |

**Side effects**: Queues an aspirate command on the run; returns immediately with the command id. Actual aspiration runs asynchronously and is polled via `GET /runs/{run_id}/commands/{id}` until status is terminal.

## Dispense

**Verb / Opcode**: POST /runs/{run_id}/commands

**Transport form**: command-class

**Confidence**: confirmed

**Request shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| commandType | string | always `"dispense"` |
| params.pipetteId | string (UUID) | id of mounted pipette |
| params.labwareId | string (UUID) | id of destination labware |
| params.wellName | string | well coordinate |
| params.wellLocation.origin | enum `top \| bottom \| meniscus` | reference point for offset |
| params.wellLocation.offset.x | float | mm |
| params.wellLocation.offset.y | float | mm |
| params.wellLocation.offset.z | float | mm |
| params.flowRate | float | μL/sec |
| params.volume | float | μL |

**Response shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| data.id | string (UUID) | command id for status polling |
| data.status | enum `queued \| running \| succeeded \| failed` | terminal states are `succeeded` / `failed` |
| data.completedAt | string (ISO-8601) or null | populated when status terminal |
| data.error | object or null | `error.errorType` + `error.detail` when status = failed |

**Side effects**: Queues a dispense command on the run; returns immediately with the command id. Actual dispense runs asynchronously and is polled until status is terminal.

## DropTip

**Verb / Opcode**: POST /runs/{run_id}/commands

**Transport form**: command-class

**Confidence**: confirmed

**Request shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| commandType | string | always `"dropTip"` |
| params.pipetteId | string (UUID) | id of mounted pipette |
| params.labwareId | string (UUID) | id of trash or tip rack |
| params.wellName | string | destination well |
| params.wellLocation.origin | enum `top \| bottom \| meniscus` | reference point for offset |
| params.wellLocation.offset.x | float | mm |
| params.wellLocation.offset.y | float | mm |
| params.wellLocation.offset.z | float | mm |

**Response shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| data.id | string (UUID) | command id for status polling |
| data.status | enum `queued \| running \| succeeded \| failed` | terminal states are `succeeded` / `failed` |
| data.completedAt | string (ISO-8601) or null | populated when status terminal |
| data.error | object or null | `error.errorType` + `error.detail` when status = failed |

**Side effects**: Queues a drop-tip command on the run; the pipette is moved to the destination and the tip is ejected. Async polling required.

## PickUpTip

**Verb / Opcode**: POST /runs/{run_id}/commands

**Transport form**: command-class

**Confidence**: confirmed

**Request shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| commandType | string | always `"pickUpTip"` |
| params.pipetteId | string (UUID) | id of mounted pipette |
| params.labwareId | string (UUID) | id of tip rack |
| params.wellName | string | tip-rack well, e.g. `A1` |
| params.wellLocation.origin | enum `top \| bottom \| meniscus` | reference point for offset |
| params.wellLocation.offset.x | float | mm |
| params.wellLocation.offset.y | float | mm |
| params.wellLocation.offset.z | float | mm |

**Response shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| data.id | string (UUID) | command id for status polling |
| data.status | enum `queued \| running \| succeeded \| failed` | terminal states are `succeeded` / `failed` |
| data.completedAt | string (ISO-8601) or null | populated when status terminal |
| data.error | object or null | `error.errorType` + `error.detail` when status = failed |

**Side effects**: Queues a pick-up-tip command on the run; the pipette is moved to the tip rack well and the tip is engaged. Async polling required.
